events.text: {"decision":"fail","risk":"critical","work_stage":"in-progress","component_conditions":["non-compliant"],"percent_complete":50,"value":0,"sound_source":"","confidence":0.95,"event_time":0,"rate":0,"order":[],"workable":[],"findings":["Workers positioned under a suspended load during active crane operations, violating OSHA 1926.1400 requirements prohibiting work beneath suspended loads.","No positive exclusion zone or tagline control observed to prevent personnel from entering the fall zone of the load."],"actions":["Immediately halt crane operations and clear all personnel from beneath and within the swing/fall radius of the suspended load.","Establish a barricaded exclusion zone around the load handling area and enforce tagline use to control load movement.","Brief the crew on OSHA 1926.1400 suspended load requirements before resuming lifts; verify lift plan and load chart compliance before any further picks."],"rationale":"Working under a suspended load is a prohibited, high-fatality-risk condition under OSHA 1926.1400; operations must stop and personnel must be cleared before any further crane activity.","references":["OSHA 1926.1400","Load charts"]}
